GeneralBoatDescription: 🔥 2022 DC 266 Dual Console – Twin Yamaha F200s – Loaded & Turn-Key! 🔥

If you’re looking for the perfect blend of family comfort, offshore capability, and serious fishability, this DC 266 Dual Console checks every box. Designed for versatility and built with premium materials, this boat delivers performance, reliability, and style in one package.
Known for legendary Yamaha reliability and efficiency
Garmin-compatible helm setup with excellent visibility
Adjustable helm seat for optimal control and comfort
Fiberglass hardtop with tempered glass windshield
Vacuum-infused fiberglass frame for strength and durability
Spacious walkthrough design with tons of storage
Wraparound bow seating – perfect for entertaining
Optional bow sunpad converts seating into a lounging oasis
Cockpit table & plush cushions for socializing
Enclosed head with sink – ideal for day trips
Cockpit shower for rinse-downs after swimming
Foldaway seating transforms cockpit into open fishing space
Wide, uncluttered cockpit for serious anglers
Swim ladder for easy water access
Smart layout for both cruising and offshore runs
Built for family days, sandbar trips, and offshore fishing alike

This DC 266 is the ultimate do-it-all boat—comfortable enough for family cruising, yet fully equipped for fishing. With low hours, twin Yamahas, and premium construction, it’s ready to hit the water immediately.
📍 Turn-key and ready for its next owner
📩 Message for more details, pricing, or to schedule a showing!
2023 Tiara Yachts 34 LS – Luxury, Power & Precision in One Stunning Package

Introducing the 2023 Tiara Yachts 34 LS — a premium luxury sport cruiser that perfectly blends bold performance with refined elegance. Measuring 34.75 feet in length, this vessel showcases Tiara’s legendary overbuilt fiberglass hull design, delivering a smooth, confident ride even when conditions turn rough.

Powered by Twin Mercury 400HP Verado Outboards (220 Hours – Fresh Service Completed), this 34 LS cruises comfortably at 30 MPH and reaches exhilarating top speeds up to 50 MPH. Whether you're chasing sunsets or offshore adventures, this boat delivers the performance to match your lifestyle.
✨ Mercury Platinum Warranty Through March 2030 — Buy with Confidence!
Joystick Control with Spot Lock & Autopilot
Seakeeper Gyro Stabilization System – Dramatically reduces roll for ultimate comfort
BRAND NEW Fischer Panda Diesel Generator – ONLY 2 Hours
Simrad GO9 Backup Unit w/ Engine Display
Spacious, well-appointed cabin perfect for weekend escapes
Climate-controlled comfort for you and your guests

The 2023 Tiara 34 LS is built for those who demand performance without sacrificing luxury. From its advanced stabilization system to its premium electronics suite and upscale finishes, every detail is designed to elevate your time on the water.
Whether you're entertaining dockside, cruising offshore, or enjoying a relaxing weekend getaway, this Tiara delivers a first-class experience every time.
Serious inquiries only. This one won’t last.

GeneralBoatDescription: 2019 Custom Carolina 28' Express – Handcrafted by Sinepuxent Boatworks

Experience the perfect blend of classic Carolina craftsmanship and modern performance with this one-of-a-kind 28' Express, finished in 2023 by renowned builder Captain Joey Miller of Sinepuxent Boatworks. Known for his traditional wood plank on frame Carolina and Deadrise-style boats, Captain Joey brings unmatched attention to detail and seaworthiness to every vessel.
Twin Suzuki 300 HP outboards with electronic gauges
Cruises effortlessly at 29 knots, top speed 45 knots
Stainless steel wheel with suicide knob
Baush custom hardtop with telescoping outriggers & rod holders
Teak covering boards with combo drink/rod holders
Pop-up spring cleats & stainless steel windlass anchoring system
High-quality wood interior with custom craftsmanship
New custom enclosure with shade covers
Deck-It style soft flooring in cockpit
Garmin electronics package: Autopilot, Radar, GPS Plotter, VHF

This isn’t just a boat—it’s a handcrafted piece of Carolina tradition brought to life with modern engineering. Perfect for tournament fishing or weekend cruising, this custom 28’ Express combines classic style, seaworthy performance, and top-tier equipment.
Must See! Contact us today to schedule a showing or sea trial.

Custom Carolina craftsmanship meets modern performance in this one-of-a-kind 28' Express, finished in 2023 by renowned builder Captain Joey Miller of Sinepuxent Boatworks. Located on Maryland’s Eastern Shore, Captain Joey is a lifelong waterman known for building traditional wood plank on frame Carolina and Deadrise-style boats with unmatched attention to detail and seakeeping ability.

This stunning Carolina-style express offers the classic look with high freeboard, dramatic flare, and an amazingly dry, seaworthy ride. Powered by twin Suzuki 300s, she cruises effortlessly at 29 knots burning just 19 GPH, and tops out at an impressive 45 knots.
Baush custom hardtop with telescoping outriggers
High-quality wood interior with custom craftsmanship throughout
Freshwater head system with 15-gallon holding tank

This is not just a boat — it's a handcrafted piece of Carolina tradition, brought to life with modern engineering and top-tier equipment. From tournament fishing to weekend cruising, this custom 28’ Express turns heads and performs beyond expectations.
Must see to truly appreciate! Contact us today to schedule a showing or sea trial.

GeneralBoatDescription: 2024 Contender 44ST – Quad Mercury Verados | Ultimate Offshore Fishing Machine

Dominate the offshore scene with the legendary Contender 44ST—a center console built for serious anglers who demand elite performance, unmatched range, and tournament-level capability. Known as one of the most feared and respected fishing platforms on the water, the 44ST is engineered to outpace, outmaneuver, and outfish anything in its class.

With a commanding 44-foot length and an expansive 12+ foot beam, this vessel delivers exceptional stability, deck space, and fishability. Backed by an incredible 600-gallon fuel capacity, the 44ST offers the range and confidence to push far offshore and back without compromise.
Powered by quad Mercury Verado outboards, this boat delivers blistering speed, smooth handling, and proven reliability—making it equally suited for tournament competition or luxury offshore cruising.
Quad Mercury Verado Engines – Power, speed, and efficiency
Mercury Joystick Piloting with Skyhook – Precision control and station-keeping at the touch of a button
(2) Garmin 24” GPS Displays – Premium navigation and fish-finding technology
Garmin GHP Autopilot – Effortless long-range cruising
Outriggers – Ready for serious offshore trolling
Twin Rhodan 120 lb Thrust GPS-Guided Trolling Motors – Ultimate positioning and stealth fishing capability
Designed with hardcore anglers in mind, this 44ST is fully equipped to handle big water and big game:
Built tough with premium components and thoughtful design:
Heavy Duty Bow Lifting Ring (Floor Peak Locker)
If you're looking for a no-compromise offshore fishing platform that blends cutting-edge technology with legendary Contender performance, this 44ST deserves your attention.
Serious inquiries only—this vessel will not last.
2022 Formula 500 SSC – MINT – Captain Maintained – Quad Mercury V12 600s – Seakeeper 9 – Loaded Raymarine + FLIR + KVH

Offered in absolutely mint condition, this 2022 Formula 500 Super Sport Crossover (500 SSC) is the definition of a turn-key, flagship day yacht—captain maintained, meticulously cared for, and fully equipped for luxury cruising, entertaining, and serious offshore performance.

This 500 SSC delivers what few boats in its class can: instant planing, incredible ride quality, and an impressively quiet running experience. Even at 30 knots, the aft deck remains quiet as a mouse, making long-distance cruising and onboard conversation effortless. The Formula 500 SSC blends the best of both worlds—open bow freedom with a fully enclosed, climate-ready salon and true overnight capability.
All coverage conveys to the next owner:
Kohler Diesel 15kW Generator – 291 hours / 280 hours loaded
Premium Electronics + Offshore Tech (Raymarine / FLIR / Sirius / AIS / KVH)
This boat is stacked with top-tier navigation, safety, and entertainment systems:
Raymarine Open Array Radar – Magnum Array
VHF Radio w/ AIS650 Class B Transceiver
KVH TV3 HD Satellite TV Antenna
KVH TracPhone LTE-1 Receiver + TracPhone LTE
Power & Performance – Quad Mercury V12 600 Verados
Purpose-built for the next generation of performance, this 500 SSC is powered by:
Smooth, confident acceleration and high-speed cruising capability

The 500 SSC is widely recognized as one of the most innovative luxury crossovers on the water—part bowrider, part express yacht, and entirely Formula. The spacious salon is fully enclosed beneath the sculpted fiberglass hardtop, with a full-width retractable glass bulkhead that allows the boat to transform from open-air to fully protected at the touch of a button—perfect for changing weather or extended cruising.
If you’re looking for a flagship Formula that is truly dialed in, loaded with the right options, and maintained to an exceptional standard, this 2022 Formula 500 SSC is a must-see.
Easy to show — contact listing broker for full details and a private showing.

Finally, a fifty-foot answer to your private escape with family and friends, combining a commanding offshore ride with unprecedented amenities and luxury. The 500 SSC offers the Formula Crossover heritage of a wide-open, single-level bowrider inviting open station-to-station wandering. From the enclosed coupe-top salon to the aft lounge bar, the 500 SSC is a true evolution and culmination of the Formula SmartZone™ concept. From the full bow lounge forward to the expansive extended swim platform aft, you will find air-conditioned comfort, entertainment and innovation. A full-width motorized glass salon bulkhead allows you to choose your degree of separation or shared fun with the aft cockpit lounges and bar areas. The 500 SSC amenities below offer a respite from the outside world with a true cabin experience. A complete galley at the cabin entry stairs, the large convertible U-lounge forward, a head with Corian surfacing, vanity sink and spacious shower create a residential feel. Slip aft to the separate stateroom with queen-size berth, sofa and complete entertainment suite. The proven, surefooted double-step FAS3Tech® hull will take your complement of guests to dinner across the bay or on far-flung offshore journeys in speed and comfort with the confidence and might of the revolutionary all-new quad Mercury V12, 600 horsepower Verado outboards. The horizons are limitless in your 500 Super Sport Crossover.

GeneralBoatDescription: Cobia 320 CC – Loaded Options – Meticulously Maintained – Aggressively Priced

If you’re looking for a fully-equipped, serious offshore center console that’s been properly cared for and kept in top condition, this Cobia 320 CC checks every box. This boat has higher hours (~1600), but it shows the benefits of consistent use and professional upkeep—serviced on schedule, dialed in, and ready to run today.

Outfitted with an impressive list of upgrades and premium options, this 320 CC is built for long-range fishing, family cruising, and confident offshore performance. From the advanced electronics package to the outriggers and comfort features, it’s a true “loaded” setup for the buyer who wants capability without compromise.
High hours (~800) but exceptionally well maintained
Offshore-ready layout with excellent fishability and comfort
Spacious seating, storage, and a well-thought-out helm and deck plan

This boat is priced to sell and reflects the engine hours accordingly—nearly $20,000 under market retail for a similarly equipped 320 CC. If you want the features, condition, and capability of a premium offshore center console without paying full retail, this is an outstanding opportunity.

This is the kind of boat that makes sense for buyers who value condition, equipment, and proven reliability over low-hour marketing. If you want a turn-key 320 CC that’s ready for the canyon, the islands, or weekend cruising with the family, this one deserves a look.
Easy to show — contact listing broker for full specs and details.
AdditionalDetailDescription: Dimensions Length: 32ft Length Overall: 32ft Min Draft: 1.92ft Beam: 10.25ft Weights Dry Weight: 9,260Lb Miscellaneous Deadrise At Transom: 21.5deg Tanks Fuel Tanks: 275gal

With an overall length of 32’, a beam of 10’ 3”, and a 275 gallon fuel capacity, the 320 CC is a spacious, big water hull capable of long range trips that can still be comfortably trailered. Designed for the discerning family fisherman, the 320 CC blends a tournament ready layout with the elegance, comfort and style of a cruiser. Serious anglers will appreciate the large unobstructed cockpit, a tackle center with sink and bait prep area big enough for all your terminal tackle and baits, under-gunwale rod storage, macerated in-deck fish boxes, and twin pressurized livewells that combine for a 70 gallon capacity. But the 320 CC is much more than a hardcore fishing machine. With elegant front seating, an electric bow table, inward opening side door, spacious walk-down forward entry head with 6’2″ of headroom, and optional integrated windshield, this boat puts a premium on riding in luxury and style. A drop-in helm pod big enough to fit dual 16” multi-function displays and a full array of control elements can be color matched to the hull and all the upholstery on board is available in three optional color packages, including a tri-color custom Bentley-style stitching. Combine all of this with the 320 CC hull’s top of class ride and the 320 CC is sure to be a stunner whether on the trolling grounds or at the marina.

Designed for luxury cruising, entertaining, and performance boating
Perfect for family weekends, sandbar parties, and coastal cruising
